title: Carus Demon damage wakeup destroys chosen magic

card.rawText: When summoned, all creatures on your opponent's side of the field are put to sleep and cannot battle for 2 turn cycles. Any damage to the sleeping creatures ends this effect and destroys 1 magic card on the field of your choice.

effect.value: When summoned, all creatures on your opponent's side of the field are put to sleep and cannot battle for 2 turn cycles. Any damage to the sleeping creatures ends this effect and destroys 1 magic card on the field of your choice.

plan.title: Carus Demon damage wakeup destroys chosen magic
plan.summary: Verify the damage/wakeup side of Carus Demon destroys a chosen magic card when sleeping creatures take damage.

notes: Read text first: When summoned, all creatures on your opponent's side of the field are put to sleep and cannot battle for 2 turn cycles. Any damage to the sleeping creatures ends this effect and destroys 1 magic card on the field of your choice.
Seed opponent magic as the destroy target.

steps: Verify a chosen magic card can be destroyed.
riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the deterministic headless route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Verify the damage/wakeup side of Carus Demon destroys a chosen magic card when sleeping creatures take damage.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
